request.description:
Adds a new user to the mock database. It validates that `firstName`, `lastName`, and `userRole` are provided and that the role is valid

**Success Response:** `201 Created` returning the new `userId`.

response.name: bad request
201 created

request.description:
Updates the information of an existing user. The `updateDate` field is automatically refreshed to the current timestamp.  
**Success Response:** `200 OK.`

Removes a user record from the in-memory array based on the provided ID. Access is restricted to `admin` users only.  
**Success Response:** `200 OK`.

response.name: not found

request.description:
Fetches the details of a single user based on their unique numeric ID.

**Error Handling:** Returns `400 Bad Request` if the ID is invalid and `404 Not Found` if the user does not exist.

Retrieves an array of all user objects currently stored in the system memory. It is used to view the complete list of registered users in the AVIRA system.

**Success Response:** `200 OK` with the `users` array.

response.name: 200 OK
